question: Can one predeclared direction-non-adverse latest-settled-funding filter turn the fixed current one-shot BTCUSDT Donchian/ATR proxy positive after costs, while outperforming its same-direction unfiltered baseline and preserving sequential evidence gates?

funding_filter.observable_time: latest Binance USD-M funding event settled by the trigger minute close
funding_filter.carry_forward: event-time forward fill; no known event means no action
funding_filter.zero_rule: neutral and eligible in either direction

development_gate: candidate only; trades >= 100; base and stress mean > 0; at least two of 2021/2022/2023 base means > 0; worst annual base mean >= -0.001; same-direction base improvement over unfiltered >= 0.0005; base p01 >= -0.02; base worst >= -0.05; rank by worst annual base mean, stress mean, base mean, improvement, identity; keep at most one
evaluation_gate: fixed candidate trades >= 60; base and stress means > 0; 2024 and 2025 base means > 0; same-direction base improvement over unfiltered >= 0.0005; base p01 >= -0.02; base worst >= -0.05
confirmation_gate: fixed candidate trades >= 15; base and stress means > 0; base p01 >= -0.02; base worst >= -0.05; trade-count-weighted evaluation plus confirmation base mean > 0
known_exposure: All underlying 2021-2026H1 BTCUSDT bars and funding events are exposed. The exact no-threshold direction-non-adverse funding filter has not been run on the locked current 1h strategy proxy before this checkpoint, so evaluation is only a rule-level sequential holdout.
allowed_fixes_after_checkpoint: parsing, timestamp, checksum and data-quality defects
implementation defects that do not alter the funding rule, strategy parameters, candidates, periods, costs, event order, ranks or gates
forbidden_after_checkpoint: adding a funding magnitude, persistence, mean, z-score, open-interest, basis or volatility threshold after viewing results
changing strategy parameters, costs, periods, ranks or gates
reading evaluation before one development candidate is fixed
reading confirmation before the fixed candidate passes evaluation
presenting exposed underlying market periods as new independent data
